Package model.user

package model.user
  • Class
    Description
    Admin
    System administrator.
    Employee
    Abstract superclass for all employees.
    GraduateStudent
    Graduate student model for master and PhD students.
    Librarian
    Library staff.
    Manager
    University manager role for academic operations.
    Reportable
    Contract for classes that can generate text reports.
    Student
    General bachelor student model with academic, registration, library, and optional researcher behavior.
    Teacher
    Teacher role responsible for course materials, marks, complaints, attendance, and student information.
    TechSupportSpecialist
    Tech support specialist handles TechRequests.
    User
    Base class for all authenticated users in the university system.
